author: codex-pm-changelog

patch.value: pm-changelog extension fails on large tracker JSON

The installed pm-changelog package command fails in this repository because its extension handler shells out to pm list-all --json with Node's default spawnSync buffer. This repository emits about 5.4 MB of JSON, triggering ENOBUFS before changelog generation can run.
pm-cli repository with 5.4 MB pm list-all --json output
Install pm-changelog 2026.5.23-1 with pm install npm:pm-changelog --project, then run pm changelog generate --stdout --status closed --group-by version.
The extension command generates changelog output or uses a streaming/input path for large trackers.
Command fails with extension_command_handler_failed; direct spawnSync reproduction reports spawnSync pm ENOBUFS.

message: Track upstream pm-changelog generation failure discovered during integration

value.author: codex-pm-changelog
value.text: Upstream status: fixed in unbraind/pm-changelog commit 5c83152 with green GitHub CI run 26343027144. npm publish of 2026.5.23-2 is blocked by npm 2FA from this shell, so pm-cli installs the fixed package from GitHub main commit 5c83152 for now.
